scripts.build: esbuild app/main.ts --bundle --outfile=app/app.js && esbuild app/sw.ts --bundle --outfile=app/sw.js --platform=browser && mkdir -p app/data && cp data/latest.json app/data/latest.json && cp data/street-cleaning.json app/data/street-cleaning.json && (cp data/cross-streets.json app/data/cross-streets.json 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp data/road-geometry.json app/data/road-geometry.json 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp data/future.json app/data/future.json 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp data/bus-stops.json app/data/bus-stops.json 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp data/garages.json app/data/garages.json 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp data/snow-emergency-routes.json app/data/snow-emergency-routes.json 2>/dev/null || true)
